name: Line
description: Draws a single straight line segment between two points.

name: Polyline
description: Draws a series of connected straight line segments as one curve.

name: Curve
description: Draws a freeform NURBS curve through control points.

name: InterpCrv
description: Draws a curve that passes through (interpolates) the picked points.

name: Arc
description: Draws an arc from center, start, and end or other inputs.

name: Circle
description: Draws a circle from center and radius or other definitions.

name: Ellipse
description: Draws an ellipse from center and two axis endpoints.

name: Rectangle
description: Draws a rectangular closed polyline from corner or center inputs.

name: Polygon
description: Draws a regular polygon inscribed or circumscribed about a circle.

name: Point
description: Creates one or more point objects at picked locations.

name: Text
description: Creates an annotation text object placed in the model.

name: Box
description: Creates a solid box from corner points and a height.

name: Sphere
description: Creates a solid sphere from a center and radius or other inputs.

name: Cylinder
description: Creates a solid cylinder from a base circle and a height.

name: Cone
description: Creates a solid cone from a base circle and an apex.

name: Pipe
description: Creates a solid pipe of given radius around a rail curve.

name: Torus
description: Creates a solid torus from a center, ring radius, and tube radius.

name: ExtrudeCrv
description: Creates a surface or extrusion by tracing a curve in a straight line.

name: ExtrudeSrf
description: Extrudes a surface in a straight line to create a solid.

name: Loft
description: Fits a surface through selected profile curves defining its shape.

name: Sweep1
description: Fits a surface through cross-section curves along one rail curve.

name: Sweep2
description: Fits a surface through cross-section curves along two rail curves.

name: Revolve
description: Creates a surface by revolving a profile curve around an axis.

name: RailRevolve
description: Revolves a profile around an axis while following a rail curve.

name: EdgeSrf
description: Creates a surface from two, three, or four selected edge curves.

name: NetworkSrf
description: Creates a surface from a network of crossing curves.

name: PlanarSrf
description: Creates a planar surface from a set of planar boundary curves.

name: Patch
description: Fits a surface through selected curves, points, meshes, or point clouds.

name: OffsetSrf
description: Offsets a surface or polysurface a constant distance from the original.

name: BlendSrf
description: Creates a smooth blend surface between two surface edges with continuity control.

name: Trim
description: Cuts and deletes parts of objects at intersections with cutting objects.

name: Split
description: Divides objects into parts using cutting objects without deleting any.

name: Join
description: Connects curves, surfaces, or meshes into a single object.

name: Explode
description: Breaks an object into its component segments, faces, or parts.

name: Fillet
description: Connects two curves with an arc of a specified radius.

name: Chamfer
description: Connects two curves with a straight, beveled line.

name: FilletEdge
description: Creates variable or constant radius fillets along polysurface edges.

name: ChamferEdge
description: Creates beveled (chamfered) surfaces along selected polysurface edges.

name: OffsetCrv
description: Offsets a curve a specified distance to one side.

name: Cap
description: Closes planar holes of an open surface or polysurface with planar faces.

name: Extend
description: Lengthens a curve by a distance or to a boundary object.

name: Rebuild
description: Rebuilds a curve or surface with a new point count and degree.

name: MergeSrf
description: Combines two untrimmed surfaces into one at a shared edge.

name: BooleanUnion
description: Combines selected solids by removing their shared volume regions.

name: BooleanDifference
description: Subtracts one set of solids from another set of solids.

name: BooleanIntersection
description: Keeps only the shared volume of the selected solids.

name: BooleanSplit
description: Splits solids by other solids, keeping both the inside and outside parts.

name: Move
description: Moves objects from a base point to a target point.

name: Copy
description: Copies objects from a base point to one or more target points.

name: Rotate
description: Rotates objects about a base point by an angle in the construction plane.

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates objects about an arbitrary axis in space.

name: Scale
description: Uniformly scales objects in three dimensions about a base point.

name: Scale1D
description: Scales objects along a single direction (one dimension).

name: Mirror
description: Creates a mirror-image copy of objects across a mirror line.

name: Array
description: Creates a rectangular grid of copies of selected objects.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates copies of objects arranged radially around a center point.

name: Orient
description: Moves and rotates objects from reference points to target points.

name: FlowAlongSrf
description: Morphs objects from a source surface to a target surface.

name: Flow
description: Morphs objects along a base curve onto a target curve.

name: Bend
description: Reshapes an object by bending it along a defined spine.

name: Twist
description: Deforms objects by twisting them around an axis.

name: Taper
description: Deforms objects by tapering them along an axis.

name: CageEdit
description: Smoothly deforms objects by editing a surrounding control cage.

name: ToSubD
description: Converts meshes, surfaces, or polysurfaces into SubD objects.

name: QuadRemesh
description: Creates a quad mesh or SubD with optimized topology from existing geometry.

name: SubDLoft
description: Creates a SubD object lofted through selected profile curves.

name: SubDSweep1
description: Creates a SubD by sweeping cross-section curves along one rail.

name: SubDSweep2
description: Creates a SubD by sweeping cross-section curves along two rails.

name: SubDBox
description: Creates a SubD box primitive with a specified face count.

name: SubDSphere
description: Creates a SubD sphere primitive.

name: InsertEdge
description: Inserts a new edge loop or edge into a SubD object.

name: Bridge
description: Connects two SubD or mesh boundaries with a bridging strip of faces.

name: RemoveCrease
description: Removes creases from selected SubD edges to make them smooth.

name: Mesh
description: Creates a polygon mesh from a NURBS surface or polysurface.

name: ReduceMesh
description: Decreases mesh face count while minimizing geometric and texture distortion.

name: MeshRepair
description: Opens the Mesh Repair panel to diagnose and fix problem meshes.

name: UnifyMeshNormals
description: Makes all face normals of a mesh point in a consistent direction.

name: MeshToNURB
description: Creates a NURBS surface for each polygon face of a mesh.

name: Distance
description: Reports the distance between two picked points.

name: Area
description: Reports the area of selected curves, surfaces, or meshes.

name: Volume
description: Reports the volume of selected closed solids or meshes.

name: CurvatureAnalysis
description: Displays surface curvature using a false-color analysis mesh.

name: Contour
description: Creates a series of equally spaced section curves through objects.

name: Section
description: Creates curves at the intersection of a cutting plane and objects.

name: NamedView
description: Saves, restores, and manages named viewport views.

name: Shade
description: Displays a shaded preview of the model in the current viewport.

name: Block
description: Defines a block from selected objects and replaces them with an instance.

name: Insert
description: Inserts an instance of a block definition or a linked file.

name: Hatch
description: Fills selected closed boundary curves with a hatch pattern.

name: Render
description: Renders the current view using the active render engine.
